title: LLMO Details
description: Aggregated CDN log metrics for LLM Optimization (LLMO) tracking, including bot classification, HTTP request patterns, response codes, and request latencies.

xdm:url.title: URL
xdm:url.description: URL path portion of the request, excluding the domain

xdm:botType.title: Bot Type
xdm:botType.description: Bot type identifier (e.g., ChatGPT-User, Claude-Web, Perplexity)

xdm:userAgent.title: User Agent
xdm:userAgent.description: Full user agent string of the requesting client (e.g., Mozilla/5.0 compatible; ChatGPT-User/1.0)

xdm:referer.title: Referer
xdm:referer.description: Hostname of the referring URL (domain only, not full URL)

xdm:xForwardedHost.title: X-Forwarded-Host
xdm:xForwardedHost.description: X-Forwarded-Host header value from CDN or proxy (or host equivalent)

xdm:timeToFirstByte.title: Time to First Byte
xdm:timeToFirstByte.description: Time to first byte (TTFB) for the HTTP request, in milliseconds

xdm:requests.title: Request Count
xdm:requests.description: Aggregated request count for this unique combination of attributes
